query: MATCH (ap:`attack-pattern`), (ap:`attack-pattern`)<-[:mitigates]-(coa:`course-of-action`), (coa:`course-of-action`)     WHERE (toLower(ap.description) CONTAINS toLower("hardware security"))     LIMIT 2000     RETURN DISTINCT ap.name, ap.mitre_id, ap.description, coa.name, coa.mitre_id, coa.description     ORDER BY rand()
